examples: Liao was deeply moved, and he made up his mind to be a good "father".
During last year's Mid Autumn Festival, Liao carried a kilo of meat and pig's feet to his home.
After dinner, the boy put his arm around Liao's neck and asked sweetly, "Uncle Liao, can I call you daddy?"
Liao's crusade led to the first stem cell treatment for epidermolysis bullosa, also known as EB.
Meanwhile, China added to their weightlifting gold rush when Liao Hui won the men's 69kg category.
